entities.name: selectSeries
entities.context: A function used in asynchronous programming

entities.name: filterSeries
entities.context: A function used in asynchronous programming

entities.name: selectLimit
entities.context: A function that limits the number of selections in asynchronous programming

entities.name: filterLimit
entities.context: A function used for limiting filters in asynchronous programming

entities.name: reject
entities.context: A function that rejects items based on a condition in asynchronous programming

entities.name: rejectSeries
entities.context: A function that rejects items in series asynchronously

entities.name: rejectLimit
entities.context: A function that limits the rejection in asynchronous programming

entities.name: detect
entities.context: A function that detects items based on a condition

entities.name: detectSeries
entities.context: A function that detects items in series asynchronously

entities.name: detectLimit
entities.context: A function that limits detection in asynchronous programming

entities.name: find
entities.context: A function commonly used to find items based on a condition

entities.name: findSeries
entities.context: A function that finds items in series asynchronously

entities.name: findLimit
entities.context: A function that limits finding in asynchronous programming

entities.name: pick
entities.context: A function that picks specified items

entities.name: pickSeries
entities.context: A function that picks items in series asynchronously

entities.name: pickLimit
entities.context: A function that limits picking in asynchronous programming

entities.name: omit
entities.context: A function that omits specified items

entities.name: omitSeries
entities.context: A function that omits items in series asynchronously

entities.name: omitLimit
entities.context: A function that limits omitting in asynchronous programming

entities.name: reduce
entities.context: A function used to reduce an array to a single value

entities.name: inject
entities.context: A function that injects values into reduce

entities.name: foldl
entities.context: A function that performs a left fold in reduce

entities.name: reduceRight
entities.context: A function used to reduce an array to a single value from the right

entities.name: foldr
entities.context: A function that performs a right fold in reduce

entities.name: transform
entities.context: A function used to transform data asynchronously

relationships.context: selectSeries relates to filterSeries as an equivalent function
selectLimit relates to filterLimit as an equivalent function
find is an earlier version of detect
findSeries is an earlier version of detectSeries
findLimit is an earlier version of detectLimit
inject is a feature of reduce
foldl is another term related to reduce
foldr relates to reduceRight as an equivalent function
